name: Security Orchestra
description: Data center power infrastructure intelligence - generator sizing with real Generac/Cummins/CAT specs (NFPA 110 compliant) and utility interconnect modeling for 9 major US utilities (Dominion, PG&E, ComEd, Georgia Power, APS, Oncor, Duke Energy, SCE, Xcel). Nationwide coverage from Northern Virginia to Phoenix.

tools.name: generator_sizing
tools.description: Size generators for data center loads with NFPA 110 compliance, altitude/temperature derating, fuel calculations, tank sizing, and installed cost estimates

tools.name: utility_interconnect
tools.description: Analyze utility interconnect requirements, timelines, and costs for 9 major US utilities with deposit estimates and competitive intelligence
